First, let me load the collection tools.Now adding the three books — with Snow Crash marked finished today:Your reading list is ready — the interactive card above shows all three books, and you can also open it anytime at `/collections/reading-list`.

- **The Left Hand of Darkness** — Ursula K. Le Guin — To Read
- **Snow Crash** — Neal Stephenson — ✅ Finished today (2026-07-13)

Each book has a "Finished" checkbox, plus optional rating (1–5) and notes fields that appear once a book is marked finished. There's also a kanban view (grouped by status) and a calendar view of finish dates. Just tell me when you start or finish a book and I'll update it.
